system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Meditation against TN 7
Type: Normal
Qi: 1

You enter a meditative position, and your arms flail wildly as you draw on your Qi to shape your body, causing your arms to sprout scales as scarlet claws grow on your fingertips. On a Success you grow claws and scales on your arms. These give you a +1 to your parry per Rank of Neigong, and do 1d10+Muscle in Damage. In addition they leave a burning mark on your foes that cause one automatic Wound, after combat ends (or after ten rounds). Lasts one round per Rank of Qi. Cathartic: This functions like normal, but the claws deal an additional automatic Wound per Rank of Qi, after combat ends (or after ten rounds).
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.catharticEffect: This functions like normal, but the claws deal an additional automatic Wound per Rank of Qi, after combat ends (or after ten rounds).
